sellers_note: Discover the perfect balance of efficiency and innovation with this 2023 Tesla Model 3 Base, finished in striking black with an electric motor that delivers responsive performance and impressive range for your daily commute and beyond.- Autopilot with advanced driver assistance features- Back-up and side view cameras with Tesla vision park assist- Blind spot warning and forward collision alert- Lane keep assist and lane departure warning system- Active Cruise Control for highway driving convenience- Heated steering wheel and heated front and rear seats- Fixed panoramic glass roof for an open, airy cabin- Front dual zone automatic temperature control- Navigation system with integrated controls- Heated door mirrors and auto-dimming rear-view mirror- Memory seat and power driver and passenger seats- Premium upgraded audio system with 8 speakers- 18 aero wheels with all-season capability- Electronic stability control and four-wheel independent suspension- Keyless start and comprehensive safety airbag systemThis Model 3 Base delivers an impressive 138 MPGe in city driving and 126 MPGe on the highway, making it an excellent choice for those seeking lower fuel costs and reduced environmental impact. The electric motor paired with the 1-speed automatic transmission provides smooth, quiet acceleration without the complexity of traditional engines. Whether navigating city streets or cruising highways, this vehicle responds with confidence and control.Inside, you'll find a thoughtfully designed cabin that prioritizes comfort and convenience. The front dual zone automatic temperature control ensures every passenger enjoys their ideal climate, while the heated steering wheel and heated front and rear seats provide warmth during colder months. Power adjustments for both driver and passenger seats, combined with memory settings, allow you to personalize your driving position for maximum comfort on every journey.Safety and awareness technology are woven throughout this Model 3. Blind spot warning, forward collision alert, and lane departure warnings work together to help keep you informed on the road. The back-up and side view cameras, along with Tesla vision park assist, make parking and low-speed maneuvering straightforward and stress-free. Four-wheel disc brakes with ABS, electronic stability control, and a comprehensive airbag system provide multiple layers of protection.The panoramic glass roof floods the interior with natural light, creating an open and inviting atmosphere that makes every drive feel special. Premium seat trim combined with heated front bucket seats and a split-folding rear seat accommodates your passengers while maintaining versatility for cargo needs. The upgraded audio system delivers quality sound whether you're enjoying music, podcasts, or navigation guidance.This 2023 Tesla Model 3 Base represents modern, efficient driving without compromise. Visit our showroom today to see how this vehicle can transform your daily driving experience Our commitment to our customers continues well beyond the date of purchase. We also have a professional team of technicians on hand with the skills and equipment to handle all manner of maintenance and repairs, as well as a full stock of authentic parts.
